references.text: Hao, G, M-L Chye & RMK Saunders. 2001. A phylogenetic analysis of the Schisandraceae based on morphology and nuclear ribosomal ITS sequences. Botanical Journal of the Linnean Society 135: 401-411
Saunders, RMK. 1997. Illiciaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 13: 169-184
Saunders, RMK. 1997. Schisandraceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 13: 185-207

genera.last_edited: Edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 12 August 2012

species.citation: Merr. , PJS 4c (1910) 254 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 154; Saunders, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 180; Type: FB 9515 Curran & Merritt (US, lecto), Luzon: Zambales, Mt Tapulao, Dec-1907. = Illicium montanum Merr. , PJS 7c (1912) 81 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 154; Type: Vanoverbergh 1048 (K, lecto), Luzon: Mountain Province, Bauco, in forest, 1650m, Jan-1911.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Aurora, Cagayan, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Zambales, MINDORO.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 10 May 2026

species.citation: (Hend. & Andr.Hend.) A.C.Sm. , Sargentia 7 (1947) 196 ; Saunders, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 13 (1997) 197; ≡ Schisandra marmorata (Hend. & Andr.Hend.) Hemsl. , Garden (London, 1871-1927) 8 (1875) 271; ≡ Sphaerostema marmoratum Hend. & Andr.Hend. , Ill. Bouquet 2 (1861) t.40; Type: the plate mentioned. = Kadsura apoensis Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2748 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 153; Type: Elmer 11718 (GH, lecto; A, E, F, K, L, MO, NA, NY, isolecto), Mindanao: Davao, Mt Apo. = Kadsura sulphurea Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2750; Type: Elmer 13505 (GH, lecto; A, E, F, K, L, MO, NA, NY, US, isolecto), Mindanao: Agusan del Norte, Mt Urdaneta. ≠ Kadsura scandens auct. non Blume ; Merr., EPFP 2 (1923) 153.
species.distribution: Borneo, Philippines. CEBU (photos), DINAGAT (photos), MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga del Norte (photos), NEGROS (photos), PALAWAN.

species.citation: Elmer , LPB 1 (1908) 277 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 153; Saunders, Fl. Males. ser. 1,13 (1997) 198; Type: Elmer 8700 (A, lecto; E, isolecto), Luzon. = Kadsura macgregorii Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 177 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 153; Type: McGregor 8340 (US, iso), Luzon: Benguet, Pauai, c. 2100m, Jun-1909. = Kadsura paucidenticulata Merr. , PJS 5c (1910) 176 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 153; Type: McGregor 8498 (K, lecto; L, NY, US, isolecto), Luzon.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Apayao (photos), Benguet, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: South Cotabato (photos).
